removedSentences: Tuscany and Umbria are the regions to watch here, though it's worth noting that not every bottle labelled "Italian" is actually pressed in Italy—some of it is just olives from elsewhere that got bottled there, which is the sort of technicality that makes you wonder if anyone's really paying attention
